title: conformance phase 2.14-plumbing: ferrotorch-core::plumbing & core types (Tensor, Storage, Device, Dispatch, Error, etc.) — 163 items pending
description:
Tracking: phase 2.14-plumbing of the ferrotorch-core conformance suite (parent issue #759).

**Module(s) covered:** tensor.rs, storage.rs, dispatch.rs, dtype.rs, error.rs, device.rs, gpu_dispatch.rs, profiler_hook.rs, named_tensor.rs, cpu_pool.rs, meta_propagate.rs, numeric_cast.rs
**Item count:** 163 `pub` items.

## Mandate

Each public item below requires CPU + GPU + autograd-where-applicable
conformance test coverage referenced from `ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance_*.rs`.
Until this phase lands its tests, every item here is excluded in
`ferrotorch-core/tests/conformance/_surface_exclusions.toml` with this issue
as its `tracking_issue` field. The strict gate
(`tests/conformance_surface_coverage.rs`) enforces the contract.

## Items pending
